name: typed-om-polyfill
description: A fully tested polyfill for the [CSS Typed OM Level 1 Specification](https://drafts.css-houdini.org/css-typed-om-1/).

scripts.build: npm run build:module && npm run build:iife && npm run build:types
scripts.test: npm run test:unit && npm run test:wpt
scripts.test:wpt: npm run build && npm run test:wpt:setup && cd tests/wpt/src && (python wpt run --headless -y --log-wptreport ../report/data.json --log-wptscreenshot=../report/screenshots.txt --log-html=../report/index.html --inject-script ../../../build/typed-om-polyfill.iife.js firefox css/css-typed-om || true) && cd ../../../ && npm run test:wpt:report
scripts.test:wpt:local: npm run test:wpt:setup && cd tests/wpt/src && python wpt serve --inject-script ../../../build/typed-om-polyfill.iife.js
